    Method
    Description
    List<Session>
    SessionDAO.getAll()
    CRUD Operation - Read Operation Returns a list of all the Session data to be read List is moved to an ObservableList which is then used to populate the TableView

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SessionDAO.delete(Session session)
    CRUD Operation - Delete Operation Delete a currently existing Session in the database
    void
    SessionDAO.insert(Session session)
    CRUD Operation - Create Operation Insert a new Session to the database, assigning the new Session fields
    void
    SessionDAO.update(Session session)
    CRUD Operation - Update Operation Update a currently existing Session in the database Perform this after calling Session setter methods
